mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in unemployment rate above 10% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing consumer spending and leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite high unemployment signals.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and housing starts indicate weak demand, causing corporate earnings disappointments and negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in contraction regimes show positive correlation with both INDPRO and HOUST declines (Rank IC < -0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rebound in industrial production above its 3-month moving average signals improved supply chain efficiency, reducing inflationary pressures and boosting equity valuations for positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline in 70%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds its 3mo MA.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 2.5% erodes real interest rates, prompting central banks to delay rate hikes and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 150k signals robust labor market demand, increasing corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX fails to outperform baseline in 70%+ of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 150k.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent declines in consumer spending (RSAFS) and GDP growth (GDPC1) indicate weak aggregate demand, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show positive correlation with both RSAFS and GDPC1 declines (Rank IC > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production above 100.5 index points signals expanding supply capacity, reducing input costs and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO exceeds 100.5.
